description_long: This is a cylindrical wooden barrel with a flat, slightly weathered wooden top and vertical staves reinforced by several horizontal wooden bands. The wood appears aged and has a light, washed-out finish, giving it a rustic look. On the front, there is a large, round sign with a blue background and a red border, featuring a red diagonal line, resembling a 'no parking' or 'prohibited' symbol. The barrel's surface shows visible wood grain and some subtle discoloration near the base, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements. There are no visible handles or openings, and the top is fully enclosed, indicating it is not currently open. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and could be used as a barrier or marker in an urban environment.
description: A weathered wooden barrel with horizontal bands and a large 'no parking' sign on the front, fully enclosed on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent 'no parking' sign and the full wooden top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the wood grain and horizontal bands, with part of the sign visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the wooden staves and bands, with no markings or signs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the edge of the sign visible on the right, showing more of the barrel's plain wood surface.
